characters.name: Crowd of people on a bridge

description: A painting showing a dense crowd of people crossing a stone arched bridge. The figures wear mostly muted green and brown clothing, walking from left to right. Below the bridge arch, a smaller group of people is visible among flowers or bushes. The sky is warm golden-orange, suggesting sunset or dawn. The style is figurative with slightly flattened, stylized forms. A few bare trees and buildings are visible in the background. The overall composition creates a sense of communal movement and shared journey.
